image_prompt: A dramatic 19th-century Romanticism marine oil painting on canvas, in the sublime tradition of J.M.W. Turner and Ivan Aivazovsky, filling the entire frame. The sailing ship pitches and rolls heavily with the swell, sails luffing in the wind, but keeps its solid form. Dramatic, powerful, cinematic storm — wind and water in motion, the vessel intact.

title: Rock-Hewn Church - Ethiopian Lalibela (AI Animated)
